title: History navigation toolbar with prev/next arrows and dropdown
purpose: Provides a toolbar for navigating document history with previous/next buttons and a dropdown menu to jump to specific versions.
module_context: Exports a HistoryToolbar React component that integrates with document editing and session management. Includes a helper function for formatting relative timestamps.

steps.content: Calculate the time difference between now and the provided timestamp.
Format the difference as a relative time string based on minutes, hours, or days.
Return 'just now' for less than a minute ago.
Return minutes, hours, or days ago for larger differences.
Return yesterday or a formatted date for differences of a week or more.
Check if document ID, project, and session are available.
IF any required context is missing, clear the history and return.
Set loading state to true before fetching.
Fetch document history from the API endpoint with project and session parameters.
IF the response is successful, parse and store the history data.
Reset the current index to represent the most recent version.
IF the response indicates not found, clear the history.
IF the fetch fails, clear the history.
Reset loading state after the fetch completes.
Check if document ID, project, and session are available.
IF any required context is missing, return null.
Fetch the specific version content from the API endpoint with project, session, and timestamp parameters.
IF the response is successful, parse and return the content.
IF the fetch fails, return null.
Check if navigation to a previous version is possible.
IF navigation is not possible, return early.
Calculate the new index for the previous version.
Fetch the content for the previous version.
Fetch the content for the version before the previous one for comparison.
Update the current index and notify parent component of the selection.
Check if navigation to a next version is possible.
IF navigation is not possible, return early.
Handle navigation to the current version if at the first historical index.
Calculate the new index for the next version.
Fetch the content for the next version.
Fetch the content for the version before the next one for comparison.
Update the current index and notify parent component of the selection.
Handle selection of the current version if index is -1.
Fetch the content for the selected historical version.
Fetch the content for the version before the selected one for comparison.
Update the current index and notify parent component of the selection.
Close the dropdown after selection.
